info.title: amz AI Operator API
info.description: Contract-first API surface for the PRD-driven Amazon AI operator. External integrations are mock-gated until credentials exist.

get.summary: Service readiness check including mock/write-safety gates
Get profit overview and order profit records
Get reorder, stale inventory, and repricing decisions
Get ad suggestions wrapped as audit actions
Get anomaly overview and mock notifications
Get Listing score and improvement suggestions
Get review clusters for a product

post.summary: Mock execute an audited action without external writes
Create a codex-local structured decision from supplied context

get.summary: GET / /api/v1/profit/skus/{productId} / 单 SKU 利润详情

put.summary: PUT / /api/v1/costs/products/{productId} / 更新单 SKU 成本

post.summary: POST / /api/v1/suppliers/recommend-allocation / 多供应商分配建议
POST / /api/v1/purchase-orders/from-reorder / 从补货建议批量生成

get.summary: GET / /api/v1/budgets/{id}/variance / 预算 vs 实际偏差

post.summary: POST / /api/v1/ads/suggestions/{id}/customize / 自定义参数后执行
